cat.description: The HEART symbol came first. It was carved into a tree at the same time as the words, Luv ‘til it Hurts. The spelling of luv was changed forever, and the buxom HEART became a megaphone— pumping loudly and emitting reverberations--desirous of speed, its incumbent pangs, swarm-like, fragment into projectiles before taking flight.

nodes.title: House of Zion Debut at Luv ‘Til It Hurts Launch
